title: Squirrel Removal in Rahway, NJ
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Rahway, NJ. Humane extraction, damage repair & exclusion. Serving residential & commercial properties. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Rahway home or business can cause serious damage to attics, wiring, and insulation. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Rahway, from the historic downtown district to residential neighborhoods near Merck's headquarters. Our humane removal process includes extraction, entry point sealing, and damage restoration with pricing between $900 and $2,500 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control expertise to Rahway properties, combining humane removal techniques with long-term exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of New Jersey's urban squirrel populations and provide guaranteed results with same-day emergency service available.
localContext: Rahway's mix of historic Victorian homes, modern apartments near the train station, and commercial buildings along St. Georges Avenue all face squirrel intrusion risks, especially during fall nesting season. The mature trees throughout neighborhoods like Colonia and near Rahway River Park provide ideal squirrel habitats that often lead to attic and soffit invasions in nearby structures.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Rahway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Rahway typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with most residential jobs averaging $1,200-$1,800.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Rahway property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Rahway and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and whether babies are present in the nest.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Rahway?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New Jersey wildlife regulations and use only humane, approved removal methods. Our process includes live trapping when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors, and relocation practices that comply with state laws while ensuring squirrels cannot re-enter your property.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Rahway homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly damage attic insulation, chew through electrical wiring creating fire hazards, tear up roof shingles and soffits, and contaminate spaces with urine and droppings. In Rahway's older homes, they often exploit existing gaps in fascia boards and roof vents, causing extensive damage if not addressed promptly.
